Text01._value: YOU WILL BE ABLE TO TRANSFER TO ANOTHER WORLD IN MAPLESTORY (THE "GAME") SUBJECT TO THE FOLLOWING RULES AND REGULATIONS: \R\N\R\N\R\N

Text02._value: 1. To be eligible for a transfer, your character must be level 50 or higher. \r\n\r\n

Text03._value: 2. Your quest history and all quests you have started will be carried over once your transfer to the new world is complete. \r\n\r\n

Text04._value: 3. All items in the inventory (including up to 100,000,000 mesos) will be carried over and transferred with you to the new server. \r\n\r\n

Text05._value: 4. All items stored with Fredrick or Hired Merchant will lose. \r\n\r\n

Text06._value: 5. Any of your items that are tagged will not be changed. \r\n\r\n

Text07._value: 6. Transferred characters will appear on the new world's rankings. \r\n\r\n

Text08._value: 7. All approved transfers shall be processed in due course and completed during a subsequent server maintenance or patch following the transfer request. Server maintenance times may change, depending on development schedule. Users should refer to MapleStory's website at maplestory.nexon.net for server maintenance times. \r\n\r\n

Text10._value: 1. Your character may not be transferred to the Scania game world. \r\n\r\n

Text11._value: 2. If married, your marriage must get annulled prior to transferring worlds. \r\n\r\n

Text12._value: 3. If you have a no empty character slots in a world, you may not transfer any characters to that world. \r\n\r\n

Text13._value: 4. Transfer of meso currency is limited to no more than 100,000,000 mesos. \r\n\r\n

Text14._value: 5. Once a transfer takes place, your Guild and Buddy list will be deleted. If you are the leader of a Guild, you may not transfer your character until you surrender leadership of the Guild to another player. \r\n\r\n

Text15._value:
6. You will not be allowed to transfer if your account records show any ban history longer than 7 days while playing the Game. 

 If you have any ban history within the past one month, you will not be able to purchase the character transfer item.

Text16._value: 7. Characters cannot create a Guild if they are in process of transferring to another world. \r\n\r\n

Text17._value: 8. You may not get married until your character transfer request is completed. \r\n\r\n

Text18._value: 9. You cannot delete a character that is currently going through a transfer. \r\n\r\n

Text19._value: 10. You cannot create any new characters under the account that has requested a transfer. Once the transfer is complete, you may resume creating new characters, so long as you have an open character slot available for that world.\r\n\r\n

Text20._value: 11. Transfers during the World Leap Event shall be limited to once per account. \r\n\r\n

Text21._value: 12. Nexon reserves the right to reject any request, in full or in part, of any transfer -- for any reason or no reason -- in its sole discretion. All terms and conditions of the Nexon User Agreement and Software License (EUASL), the Station Terms of Service and the Rules of Conduct found on www.nexon.net continue to apply to any and all accounts. You will not be allowed to transfer an account that is not yours and that was not originally registered by you. \r\n\r\n

Text23._value: Price for a character transfer during the World Leap Event: 1 meso \r\n\r\n

Text24._value: BY CLICKING ON THE "I ACCEPT" BUTTON BELOW, YOU ACKNOWLEDGE THAT (1) YOU HAVE READ AND REVIEWED THIS AGREEMENT IN ITS ENTIRETY, (2) YOU AGREE TO BE BOUND BY THIS AGREEMENT, (3) YOU HAVE THE POWER, AUTHORITY AND LEGAL RIGHT TO ENTER INTO THIS AGREEMENT, (4) THIS AGREEMENT CONSTITUTES A BINDING AND ENFORCEABLE AGREEMENT, AND (5) WITHOUT LIMITING YOUR CONSENT TO OR THE SCOPE OF THIS AGREEMENT OR THE LICENSES GRANTED HEREIN, OR ANY FUTURE GRANT OF RIGHTS, CONSENT, AGREEMENTS, ASSIGNMENTS, AND WAIVERS YOU MAKE WITH RESPECT THERETO, YOU HEREBY RATIFY ANY PRIOR GRANT OF RIGHTS, CONSENTS, AGREEMENTS, ASSIGNMENTS AND WAIVERS MADE BY YOU.\r\n\r\n
